name: Synup vs PinMeTo
hero_main_title: Choose Synup over PinMeTo for complete Local SEO support
hero_summary: Synup offers comprehensive Local SEO solutions for multi-location businesses of all sizes. Along with managed services, you get a fully-branded, whitelabeld dashboard customizable for all your needs.
counter_text_1: say they effortlessly increased store visits
counter_text_2: of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year
counter_text_3: businesses seamlessly listed across key online platforms
section_2_heading: A faster, better local solution that helps you do more effortlessly!
section_2_summary: Tired of outdated, glitchy UIs? Switch to Synup. Get a faster, smoother experience with its API-enabled, AI-driven software. Get a much more comprehensive listing management solution, along with a fully integrated social media and a reputation management system that helps you do more and go the extra mile.
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup offers a more advanced approach to reputation management compared to PinMeTo. You can automate your review responses, generate reviews via email and SMS, and integrate Synup with your CRM/POS tools to boost positive feedback. This means a more effective way to manage and enhance your business’s reputation.
section_2_slider_2_summary: With Synup, you get a full suite of listing management features. It's not just about managing listings and fixing inaccuracies; you also benefit from bulk edits, data aggregator support, and brand audit reports to monitor local SEO performance and optimize your listings based on the insights gathered. These tools help ensure accuracy, making Synup a robust solution for businesses of all sizes.
section_2_step_3_summary: Synup's complete white label support makes it ideal for resellers and agencies of all sizes. Customize your dashboard to reflect your brand and build client trust. Win over your prospects with a detailed whitelabeled scan tool that covers local listings, voice-search optimization, review visibility, social visibility, and search visibility.
section_2_slider_4_heading: End to end Social Media Management
section_2_slider_4_summary: With Synup, you get access to a complete social media management suite. Seamlessly integrate with multiple platforms to create and schedule posts in seconds. Develop and implement effective social strategies while utilizing interactive graphs and detailed analytics to gain deeper insights into your clients. This comprehensive suite helps you streamline your social media efforts and enhance your overall strategy.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
why_choose_tab_desc_1: While PinMeTo offers basic listings, reputation, and social media management, Synup goes further. Manage your business effortlessly by driving real outcomes with our solutions top-tier Local SEO and API integrations, you have a powerful local marketing solution right at your fingertips.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Synup surpasses PinMeTo in review management with features like response templates, review generation via email and SMS, and customer leaderboard reports. Plus, with CMS and POS integrations, you can understand and serve your audience better.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: With Synup, you benefit from bulk verification and data aggregator support, ensuring accurate, up-to-date information. Additional brand-audit reports for multi-location businesses make Synup the ideal tool for agencies and business owners.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Forefront of Digital Innovation
why_choose_content_summary: Choose Synup – Where Advanced Technology Meets Market Needs.
testimonial_summary: Boost your online presence effortlessly with Synup's Local Listings Management. List, optimize, and monitor profiles on Google, Facebook, Yelp, and premium partner sites. Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
customer_review_1_summary: Synup empowered us to drive 20% more revenue through profile personalization - the numbers speak for themselves!
customer_review_2_name: Adrian Boysell CEO of Adrian Graphics & Marketing
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is a game-changer. Every multi-location business needs to use this service.

seo.title: Pinmeto Alternative Comparison | Find the Best Local Marketing Solution
seo.description: Compare Pinmeto alternative solutions to find the perfect fit for your local marketing needs. Discover features, pricing, and reviews to make an informed decision.
